description: ClickHouse query throughput: query/select/insert/failed rates and counters, selected/inserted rows & bytes, and merges. Panels adapted as a reference from the ClickHouse mix-in (Grafana dashboard 23415, github.com/ClickHouse/clickhouse-mixin, commit c54f56e0). Rebuilt on PMM's Apache-2.0 dashboard shell.

panels.description: SELECT query rate vs failed SELECT rate.
panels.title: SELECT Query Rate

panels.description: INSERT query rate vs failed INSERT rate.
panels.title: INSERT Query Rate

panels.description: Cumulative query counters since server start.
panels.title: Cumulative Queries

panels.description: Cumulative failed-query counters since server start.
panels.title: Cumulative Failed Queries

panels.description: Number of queries currently being executed.
panels.title: Live Queries

panels.description: Rows and bytes read by SELECT queries per second.
panels.title: Selected Rows / Bytes

panels.description: Rows and bytes written by INSERT queries per second.
panels.title: Inserted Rows / Bytes

panels.description: Background merge operations and merged rows per second.
panels.title: Merge Rate

panels.description: Active tasks in the background merges & mutations pool.
panels.title: Background Merge Pool Tasks

title: ClickHouse Query Performance
